name: geocode
description: Search for locations by name using Open-Meteo Geocoding API. Returns coordinates, timezone, country, and population for matching cities and places.

name.description: Location name to search for (city, town, postal code). Minimum 2 characters.

count.description: Number of results to return (max 100). Default: 5

language.description: Language code for localized names (e.g., 'en', 'de', 'fr'). Default: 'en'
